description: 計画→設計→実装→テスト→報告の全フェーズを統合実行するメタオーケストレーター。各フェーズはサブスキルに Agent ツール経由で委譲する。エスカレーション駆動でユーザー介入を最小化。

results.query: Run dev-pipeline on the new chat feature. plans/CHAT.md has the requirements — go through design, impl, test, report autonomously. Only escalate design judgment calls.
I want a new component (notification system) built end-to-end from requirements to merged PR. Plan is in plans/NOTIFICATION.md. Autopilot the whole pipeline.
Start the full pipeline (Phase 0-4) for the inventory rewrite. plans/INVENTORY-REWRITE.md is the plan. Self-drive the whole thing, ping me only on Tier 1 escalations.
full auto on the search rewrite. plans/SEARCH.md has reqs. only ping me for design calls and major architectural choices
Take this requirements doc and run the entire dev pipeline — design, impl, parallel reviews, tests, the whole thing. plans/PAYMENT-V2.md is ready.
Execute /dev-pipeline on the auth refactor. plans/AUTH-REWRITE.md is detailed. Phases 1-4 autonomous, only Phase 0 (planning) is approved already.
kick off the pipeline for the export feature, plans/EXPORT.md has everything. wake me when its done or if you need a design call
End-to-end autonomous build for the new admin dashboard from plans/ADMIN.md. I want design, impl, review, test, and a final report — escalation-driven only.
Run dev-pipeline on the discount system. Plan is in plans/DISCOUNT.md, escalate only for design judgment calls and verification gate failures.
Build the entire shipping calculator feature autonomously — requirements in plans/SHIPPING.md, expect ~3 components (rate-calc, address-validate, label-print).
I have DESIGN/05_inventory.md ready. Implement the component end-to-end with the 6-stage process — no design phase needed, skip straight to impl.
Just need design docs from plans/CHAT.md, not the full implementation. Skip impl and test phases.
Quick review pass on my last 3 commits before I open the PR — Critical/Warning/Info breakdown.
Fix the bug in handlers/order.ts that's failing tests. Verify regression after the fix.
What's the difference between an orchestrator and a coordinator pattern in distributed systems?
Deep security audit on the auth code in src/auth/ before release — S-Critical/S-High findings.
Help me draft a project plan for migrating from Vue 2 to Vue 3 with Composition API.
Explain the difference between continuous integration and continuous deployment with examples.
Implement the auth component from DESIGN/01_auth.md, the design is finalized. 6-stage impl process.
Set up a CI/CD pipeline for this Node.js project using GitHub Actions — build, test, deploy stages.
